title: cynanchum mannii
intro: Cynanchum mannii, also known as the Himalayan milkvine, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cynanchum mannii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum mannii is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
